title: Design specialised landscape
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Design specialised landscape demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Develop a design brief

pcs.text: Consult with client to establish the purpose and requirements of the design
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Consult with client to establish the purpose and requirements of the design?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Consult with client to establish the purpose and requirements of the design.

pcs.text: Inspect site and note the physical elements and features of the site
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Inspect site and note the physical elements and features of the site?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Inspect site and note the physical elements and features of the site.

pcs.text: Conduct a functional analysis of the site
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct a functional analysis of the site?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct a functional analysis of the site.

pcs.text: Develop design criteria and design brief, and consult with client to finalise agreement of the brief
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop design criteria and design brief, and consult with client to finalise agreement of the brief?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop design criteria and design brief, and consult with client to finalise agreement of the brief.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Develop a design brief

elements.title: Design with plants as a main focus of the design project

pcs.text: Categorise plant families and genera, species and cultivars suitable for the design
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Categorise plant families and genera, species and cultivars suitable for the design?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Categorise plant families and genera, species and cultivars suitable for the design.

pcs.text: Identify a wide range of plants for different design criteria and requirements, which include the use of aesthetic, ornamental, productive and economic plant groups
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify a wide range of plants for different design criteria and requirements, which include the use of aesthetic, ornamental, productive and economic plant groups?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify a wide range of plants for different design criteria and requirements, which include the use of aesthetic, ornamental, productive and economic plant groups.

pcs.text: Determine and select plants according to design criteria
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine and select plants according to design criteria?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine and select plants according to design criteria.

pcs.text: Use botanical nomenclature when documenting plants
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Use botanical nomenclature when documenting plants?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Use botanical nomenclature when documenting plants.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Design with plants as a main focus of the design project

elements.title: Consider a range of factors that may influence plant performance

pcs.text: Determine the implications of climate and environment on plant selection and design
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine the implications of climate and environment on plant selection and design?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine the implications of climate and environment on plant selection and design.

pcs.text: Select plants that are adaptive to microclimates and mesoclimates in domestic and small to moderate-scale public spaces
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select plants that are adaptive to microclimates and mesoclimates in domestic and small to moderate-scale public spaces?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select plants that are adaptive to microclimates and mesoclimates in domestic and small to moderate-scale public spaces.

pcs.text: Report on the cultural techniques required to establish and maintain plants in specialised environments
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Report on the cultural techniques required to establish and maintain plants in specialised environments?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Report on the cultural techniques required to establish and maintain plants in specialised environments.

pcs.text: Identify soil types and condition, and make recommendations for appropriate soil management techniques
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify soil types and condition, and make recommendations for appropriate soil management techniques?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify soil types and condition, and make recommendations for appropriate soil management techniques.

pcs.text: Identify organic and inorganic fertilisers, and make recommendations
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify organic and inorganic fertilisers, and make recommendations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify organic and inorganic fertilisers, and make recommendations.

pcs.text: Identify common plant disorders and make recommendations
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify common plant disorders and make recommendations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify common plant disorders and make recommendations.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Consider a range of factors that may influence plant performance

elements.title: Develop design specifications

pcs.text: Incorporate instructions on the use and production of compost
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Incorporate instructions on the use and production of compost?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Incorporate instructions on the use and production of compost.

pcs.text: Define propagation and planting techniques to be used
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Define propagation and planting techniques to be used?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Define propagation and planting techniques to be used.

pcs.text: Specify situations where staking and guying would be required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Specify situations where staking and guying would be required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Specify situations where staking and guying would be required.

pcs.text: Define pruning and shaping techniques to be used
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Define pruning and shaping techniques to be used?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Define pruning and shaping techniques to be used.

pcs.text: Outline the biological, organic and inorganic plant and plant pest management techniques to be used
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Outline the biological, organic and inorganic plant and plant pest management techniques to be used?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Outline the biological, organic and inorganic plant and plant pest management techniques to be used.

pcs.text: Seek expert advice on irrigation requirements for the design
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Seek expert advice on irrigation requirements for the design?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Seek expert advice on irrigation requirements for the design.

pcs.text: Develop a weed management plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop a weed management plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop a weed management plan.

pcs.text: Document and present the design plan to the client
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Document and present the design plan to the client?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document and present the design plan to the client.
